create_a_devin_session_with_a_clear_engi: Create a Devin session with a clear engineering task prompt and report the session id and link.
describe_what_you_want_devin_to_do: Describe what you want Devin to do...
enter_message_to_send_to_devin: Enter message to send to Devin...
get_a_devin_session_status_and_recent_me: Get a Devin session status and recent messages and summarize what it has accomplished or where it is blocked.
integrate_devin_into_your_workflow_creat: Integrate Devin into your workflow. Create sessions to assign coding tasks, send messages to guide active sessions, and retrieve session status and results. Devin autonomously writes, runs, and tests code.
list_of_sessions: List of sessions ([{sessionId, url, status, statusDetail, title, tags, acusConsumed, pullRequests, playbookId, isArchived, ...}])
maximum_acu_budget_for_this_session: Maximum ACU budget for this session
maximum_number_of_results_to_return: Maximum number of results to return
message_to_send_to_the_session: Message to send to the session
messages_in_the_session: Messages in the session ([{eventId, source, message, createdAt}])
optional_playbook_id_to_guide_the_sessio: Optional playbook ID to guide the session
pagination_cursor_for_the_next_page: Pagination cursor for the next page
pagination_cursor_for_the_next_page_or_n: Pagination cursor for the next page, or null if last page
pagination_cursor_from_a_previous_respon: Pagination cursor from a previous response
playbook_id_to_guide_the_session: Playbook ID to guide the session
pull_requests_created_during_the_session: Pull requests created during the session ([{pr_url, pr_state}])
send_a_message_to_an_active_devin_sessio: Send a message to an active Devin session to answer a question or redirect its work.
session_attachments: Session attachments ([{attachmentId, name, url, source, contentType}])
session_status_new_claimed_running_exit_: Session status (new, claimed, running, exit, error, suspended, resuming)
tags_comma_separated_string_or_array_of_: Tags (comma-separated string or array of strings)
total_number_of_results_if_provided: Total number of results, if provided
url_to_view_the_session_in_devin_ui: URL to view the session in Devin UI
whether_to_archive_instead_of_terminate_: Whether to archive instead of terminate the session
